mapper.sql: c.id, c.blog_id, c.parent_id, c.user_id, CASE WHEN c.user_id IS NOT NULL THEN u.nickname ELSE c.nickname END AS nickname, c.email, c.content, c.status, c.ip, c.create_time, u.avatar AS avatar
mapper.select: SELECT FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE blog_id = #{blogId} AND status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE (blog_id IS NULL OR blog_id = 0) AND status = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment (blog_id, parent_id, user_id, nickname, email, content, status, ip, create_time) VALUES (#{blogId}, #{parentId}, #{userId}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{content}, #{status}, #{ip}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE comment SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
